Rays of Fury

Triggers: 4 sec

Arrows of Silence
The artifact's owner launches arrows at 3 random enemy units (preferred target: mage). Upon hitting, these arrows afflict the targets with silence for 4 sec. Enemy units cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). The arrows also reduce the maximum health, magic armor and spell power of the targets by 25% for 4 sec, deal 375000 pure damage and explode, setting 2 enemy units closest to the primary targets. Units on fire receive 350000 magic damage, and the healing they receive is reduced by 40% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
